headline: JPMorgan Expands European Security Initiative As Long Term Returns Stand Out
summary: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE:JPM) is expanding its $1.5 trillion, 10 year Security and Resiliency Initiative across Europe. The firm has appointed former UK Defence Chief, Admiral Sir Tony Radakin, to a strategic advisory role supporting the program. The European push targets sectors including supply chain, defense and aerospace, and advanced manufacturing. headline: JPMorganChase Expands Security and Resiliency Initiative Across Europe
summary: NEW YORK, April 21, 2026--JPMorganChase today announced the expansion of its $1.5 trillion, 10-year Security and Resiliency Initiative (SRI) — which seeks to facilitate, finance and invest in industries vital to economic security — across Europe.
